name: Active Agents
description: Lets the coordinator see what other agents are doing right now — which background ask_agent dispatches are still running, the task summary, and how long they've been at it.
intent_examples: what are the other agents up to
is anyone running a task right now
is the email agent still working on that
how is the deep research going

function.name: list_active_agents
function.description: Returns the list of currently-running background agent tasks across the user's session: which agent is working, what task it was given, and how long it has been running. Use this when the user asks 'what is X doing', 'is X still working', 'how's the background job', 'who's busy right now', or similar status-check intents — never guess; always call this tool.
